title: Harstad, Troms og Finnmark — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Harstad, Troms og Finnmark: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Harstad is a city in Troms og Finnmark with a population of 25,000. A northern Norwegian town on the island of Hinnøya, known for its Arctic nature and cultural festivals.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
